summary:
Overview

An open-source AutoCAD plugin that calculates the total length of selected objects (lines, polylines, arcs) instantly. Designed for AutoCAD 2024 and 2025.

Problem Solved

Measuring multiple lines, polylines, and arcs in AutoCAD manually is time-consuming and error-prone. This tool automates the entire process with a clean, dedicated interface.

Key Features

  • Object Filtering: Select specific types (Lines, Polylines, Arcs) or all at once
  • Instant Calculation: Displays total length immediately
  • Object Count: Shows how many objects were counted
  • User-Friendly Interface: Simple, non-intrusive window
  • Easy Command: Launch with ZLen command

Technical Stack

  • Language: C# / .NET
  • Platform: AutoCAD 2024, 2025
  • API: AutoCAD .NET API
  • UI: WPF

Links

  • GitHub Repository
  • Blog Post

Impact

Saves hours of manual measurement work for CAD professionals working with complex drawings containing hundreds of linear objects.
title: CodeHaks TotalLength

content:
I’m a Senior Software Developer with a Mechanical Engineering background and 16+ years of experience building custom plugins and automation tools for AutoCAD, SolidWorks, and Revit.
Most CAD developers are software engineers who learned CAD. I’m a mechanical engineer who became a software engineer — so I read your engineering problem first and design the right tool for it, instead of building a clever plugin nobody uses.
What I do:
🔧 Custom Plugin & Add-in Development AutoCAD (ObjectARX C++, .NET, VBA, AutoLISP), SolidWorks API, Revit API. From a 2-day macro to a multi-month commercial product — fixed scope, fixed price, source code on delivery.
☁️ Autodesk Cloud Integration APS (Forge): Data Management, Model Derivative, Design Automation, Webhooks. ACC: Issues, Docs, Model Coordination, Tasks. Connect your CAD desktops to ERP, PLM, and BI dashboards.
⚙️ CAD Process Automation Batch exports (DWG → PDF, RVT → IFC/NWC, SLDDRW → PDF), bulk parameter updates, BOM generation, drawing standard enforcement, file management. Replace hours of manual work with one click.
📐 Engineering Domain Tools Tunnel cross-section analysis (horseshoe and box, over-/under-profile), HVAC load calc per ASHRAE, heat exchanger tube sheet layouts (30°/45°/60°/90°), isometric gas piping with longest-run detection, surveying point import and grid drawing.
🧱 Currently Revit Add-on Developer at Auxalia — full ownership of the company’s Revit plugin portfolio. Cut release cycles from 2 weeks to 3 days; reduced support tickets by 40% via centralized logging and proactive bug fixes; migrated three legacy add-ins from .NET Framework 4.7 to .NET 6.
Past delivery includes web platforms handling 50,000+ concurrent users and BIM tools used in metro tunnels, dam projects, and large-scale construction.
🛠️ Stack C#, VB.NET, C++, VBA, AutoLISP · ASP.NET Core, Blazor, WPF · SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis · Docker, GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps · APS, ACC, Revit API, AutoCAD .NET, ObjectARX, SolidWorks API
📬 Open to: • Custom Revit / AutoCAD / SolidWorks plugin projects • APS / ACC integration consulting • Part-time contract roles with AEC tech and CAD ISV firms
Let’s talk → ghods.hakim@hotmail.com

title: About

content:
Measuring multiple lines, polylines, and arcs in AutoCAD can be a repetitive task. Manually summing their lengths is not only time-consuming but also prone to errors.
To solve this, CodeHaks TotalLength offers a simple, dedicated interface to automate this process. It’s a lightweight add-on designed specifically for AutoCAD 2024 and 2025.
What is CodeHaks TotalLength? CodeHaks TotalLength is an open-source AutoCAD plugin that calculates the total length of selected objects (lines, polylines, arcs) instantly. It provides a clean UI to filter object types, view the object count, and get the aggregated length—all with a few clicks.
Key Features Object Filtering: Select specific types (Lines, Polylines, Arcs) or all at once. Instant Calculation: Displays the total length of the selected set immediately. Object Count: Shows how many objects were counted in the selection. User-Friendly Interface: A simple, non-intrusive window that keeps you productive. Easy Command: Launch the tool using the ZLen command. Installation & Setup Getting started is straightforward:
Download the Release: Go to the Releases section of the repository and download the latest .zip file (e.g., v1.0.0). Extract the Files: Unzip the archive to a permanent location on your computer. Load the Plugin in AutoCAD: Open AutoCAD 2024 or 2025. Type NETLOAD in the command line and press Enter. Browse and select the CodeHaks.TotalLength.dll file. Run the Tool: Type ZLen in the command line and press Enter. The main window will appear. How to Use the Tool Once the ZLen command is active, the workflow is very intuitive:
In the Object Types panel, check the boxes for the object types you want to include in the measurement (e.g., “Lines” and “Polylines”). Click the Select Objects button. In the AutoCAD drawing area, select the desired objects and press Enter. The Total Length panel will instantly display: The Total Length of all selected objects. The Object Count (how many items were selected). Why Use This Plugin? Accuracy: Eliminates manual calculation errors. Speed: Cuts down the time spent on quantity takeoffs or material estimations. Free & Open Source: Licensed under the MIT License, so you can use it freely and even contribute to its development. Requirements AutoCAD Versions: 2024 or 2025. .NET Framework: Version 4.8 or later. Get Involved The project is actively maintained by codehaks. You can contribute by:
Reporting issues or suggesting features on the GitHub Issues page. Forking the repository and submitting a pull request for enhancements or bug fixes. Visit the official repository: codehaks/acad-TotalLength on GitHub
Streamline your AutoCAD measurements today with CodeHaks TotalLength.

title: Simplify Your Workflow: Calculate Total Length in AutoCAD with CodeHaks TotalLength
